sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114323" key="xoirw/nia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χοιρ-ώνια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, misspelling of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χειρώνεια</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἕλκη</foreign>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cyran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">34</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
